title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores logarithmic transformations of images through Escher's Print Gallery, using conformal maps and complex analysis. The video demonstrates how complex exponential and logarithmic functions create recursive spiral patterns and explains the deeper mathematics behind the artwork.
